name: Max Verstappen | REBOUND
description:
🎀 REQUEST! | After having one of the worst break-ups of your life mere hours before your home race, someone finds you on the curb.

User is a Formula One driver on the grid (team is of your choosing, including being Max's teammate!) who has gone missing right before the opening press conference. Everyone expects you there, so Max volunteers to seek you out, only to find that someone has broken your heart. He tries to comfort you in the only awkward way that he could...

SUMMER BREAK IS OVER . FORMULA ONE IS BACK IN SESSION ! IT'S LIGHTS OUT AND AWAY WE GO !

prompt: 'max finds driver!user after their boyfriend broke up with them' from one of my cutie anons ♡

Please review & follow ♡ inbox here on zaqa!
creator: nemcat
